description: Explicit mapping from (classNum, subject, chapterId) to master-curriculum-index.json chapter_title. Used by academicReview.ts to resolve official curriculum context for each question. Only HIGH-confidence, objectively verified mappings are included. Ambiguous or unverified chapters are absent — the reviewer will return MISSING for those.
rationale: The question bank uses old NCERT chapter names (pre-2024-25 reform). The curriculum index uses new 2024-25 integrated-textbook names. Subject names also differ: QB stores Physics/Chemistry/Biology separately; the index records all as Science. Prefix matching was unsafe across these naming conventions, so this explicit map is used instead.

entries.subject: Physics
entries.notes: QB: 'Motion' (old NCERT name). New 2024-25 Exploration textbook renames this to 'Describing Motion Around Us'. Same content: distance, displacement, speed, velocity, acceleration, equations of motion.

entries.subject: Physics
entries.notes: QB: 'Force and Laws of Motion'. New textbook title. Same content: Newton's three laws, inertia, momentum, conservation of momentum.

entries.subject: Physics
entries.notes: QB: 'Work and Energy'. New textbook adds 'Simple Machines' explicitly in title. Same core content with expanded scope. Index title matches the Exploration textbook chapter directly.

entries.subject: Physics
entries.notes: QB: 'Sound'. New textbook expands the title. Same content: nature of sound, propagation, reflection, echo, SONAR, human ear.

entries.subject: Chemistry
entries.notes: QB chapterName is already 'Exploring Mixtures and Their Separation' — differs from index only in capitalisation of 'their'. Same chapter. Matter purity, mixtures, solutions, separation techniques.

entries.subject: Biology
entries.curriculumTitle: Cell: The Building Block of Life
entries.notes: QB: 'The Fundamental Unit of Life'. New textbook retitles to 'Cell: The Building Block of Life'. Same content: cell theory, plant vs animal cells, organelles, cell membrane, nucleus.

entries.subject: Biology
entries.notes: QB: 'Tissues'. New textbook adds 'in Action'. Same content: plant tissues (meristematic, permanent) and animal tissues (epithelial, connective, muscular, nervous).

entries.subject: Biology
entries.curriculumTitle: Patterns in Life: Diversity and Classification
entries.notes: QB chapterName is already 'Patterns in Life: Diversity and Classification' — exact match with index. Same chapter.

entries.notes: QB chapterName is 'Orienting Yourself: The Use of Coordinates' — exact match with index.

entries.notes: QB chapterName is 'The Mathematics of Maybe: Introduction to Probability' — exact match with index.

entries.notes: QB chapterName is 'Predicting What Comes Next: Exploring Sequences and Progressions' — exact match with index.

entries.subject: Mathematics
entries.notes: QB chapterName is 'Measuring Space: Perimeter and Area' — exact match with index.

entries.subject: Mathematics

not_mapped.subject: Chemistry
not_mapped.reason: No unambiguous match in index. Old NCERT chapter on states of matter and physical/chemical changes. The new Exploration textbook has no chapter with a directly equivalent scope visible in the index.

not_mapped.subject: Chemistry
not_mapped.reason: Ambiguous: could map to 'Journey Inside the Atom' or 'Atomic Foundations of Matter'. Cannot determine without reading both new chapters. Leaving MISSING to avoid silent false-positive match.

not_mapped.subject: Chemistry
not_mapped.reason: Ambiguous: 'Atomic Foundations of Matter' is a plausible match but not confirmed without reading the new textbook. Leaving MISSING.
